task: Adoption run of the A2G 3GPP TR 36.777 model at the correct UMa-AV binding; solve + correctness gate. Executes docs/decisions.md D01.
expectation: Written before the run: computed LoS probability and total loss match the 3GPP-verified ground truth in expected.json at every test distance, and the scenario-consistency check passes (gate exits 0).
provenance_note: Genuine, license-free run (only Python stdlib). Ground truth in expected.json is anchored to 3GPP TR 36.777 as verified in examples/a2g-pathloss-3gpp.md; not independently re-read from the standard during this run. arch_native_verified is false: x86_64 under Rosetta, not native arm64.
